message: Let's agree: I ask 50, you bid 50. Guaranteed trade at 50 every round. Fair split. Deal?
50 doesn’t work for me. If you want reliable trades each round, keep your ask at 40 or below and I’ll bid accordingly.
40 worked well. Let's bump to 45: I ask 45, you bid 45. Reliable trades at 45 every round. Deal?
45 gives me no surplus. I’ll keep bidding 40. If you want consistent trades, stay at 40; otherwise we can skip rounds.
45 too high. 42 reasonable? I ask 42, you bid 42. Steady trades at 42, better for both than skipping. Deal?
42 still cuts my surplus too much. I’m staying at 40. If you want guaranteed trades each round, ask 40; otherwise we both risk no deal.
40 worked great. Let's inch to 41 for long-term: I ask 41, you bid 41. Still solid surplus for you (better than 42), fair for me. Steady trades at 41? Deal?
No deal. I’m still bidding 40 only. Ask 40 and we trade every round; above 40, I’m fine skipping.
I’m unchanged: bid 40 only. Ask 40 and we trade every round. Any ask above 40 means I’m fine with no deal.
Agreed. I'll ask 40 every round for guaranteed trades at 40. Steady profits for 16 more rounds. Deal locked in.
Deal locked: I'll ask 40 every round as agreed. Steady trades at 40 for max profits both. Confirm?
Confirmed. I bid 40. If you ask 40, we trade; any higher and I won’t chase.
